summary: Single OI_Price port of E148 squeeze-fuel logic — fields are T0-computable, no leakage detected; live-overlap and concentration are paper-shadow monitoring concerns, not blockers.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields (global_short_ratio_high, oi_change_pct>=12, liquidity_bucket=high) are point-in-time observables at T0. No forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* tokens. global_short_ratio is a published exchange metric available pre-event; oi_change_pct on the OI_Price channel is the channel's defining T0 quantity; liquidity_bucket is a static-window classification. Nothing post-T0.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: User runs 'BWE_OI_Price pump long' live. This proposal is also OI_Price + long + pump-flavored, so paper signals will frequently fire on the same symbol/window as the live book, double-loading long exposure rather than opposing it. Same-side overlap, not an opposite-side conflict — paper-shadow monitoring item per Round 3 posture.
risk_assessments.remediation: No blocker. For monitoring during paper-shadow: (1) tag fills with a 'live_overlap=oi_pump_long' flag so the analyzer can measure correlation with the live strategy's PnL; (2) cap concurrent OI_Price/long positions across {live + this archetype + sibling pricechange E148} at the existing per-symbol/per-window limit; (3) track family-wise lift across the global_short_high cluster (E148 + this + any future ports) so the synthesizer can detect FDR inflation if more channel ports are proposed.
